title: Build a Personal Contact Manager
description: Build a fully functional contact manager from scratch, adding features chapter by chapter. By the end, you'll have a CLI app with data storage, search, formatting, and error handling — all using concepts from the book.
final_description: A complete contact manager CLI app with structured data, formatted display, multi-field search, file persistence, contact updates, an interactive menu system, and statistics reports — built across 10 chapters using progressively advanced Python concepts.
